subcodes.first_line: It is incumbent upon every soul, when departing from home and kin, to fix an appointed time for the journey, and this appointed time, to whatever extent determined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بر هر نفسی لازم حین خروج از وطن و قرین خود میقاتی از برای سفر معین نماید و میقات را هر قدر معین
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement, @laws of marriage and dowry
